templates.name: SaaS Landing
templates.description: A high-contrast technology template with dark neon surfaces. Perfect for SaaS products, developer tools, and tech startups.
templates.longDescription: SaaS Landing is a polished, conversion-focused landing page template built for technology companies. It features a dark neon aesthetic, strong hero sections, and supports all major content blocks including feature grids, stats, CTA banners, and contact forms.

categories.label: Blog
categories.description: Personal and technical blogs. Clean typography, fast loading, multilingual ready.

categories.label: Enterprise
categories.description: Corporate websites and landing pages. Professional design for companies and startups.

categories.label: Affiliate
categories.description: E-commerce and multi-product sites. Publish product catalogs and drive conversions.

categories.label: Content
categories.description: Novel sites, video platforms, and media. Built for content-heavy experiences.
